overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a gold convertible driving at high speed through a futuristic metropolis. The vehicle travels from a covered elevated highway through dense urban canyons lined with neon billboards, transitioning into an industrial zone with factories and smokestacks under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated highway with translucent ceiling panels

events.description: vehicle overtakes multiple cars on the left lane while maintaining high speed
approaching the exit from the covered highway section into open sky

agents.ego_description: driving a gold convertible at high speed through moderate traffic, weaving between vehicles under the elevated structure

notable_agents.action: red sedan being overtaken on the left side
black vehicle ahead in the same lane maintaining distance

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass with translucent blue-green ceiling panels filtering sunlight
large cylindrical concrete columns supporting the overhead highway structure
tall glass and steel buildings with neon accents visible in the distance
large green neon sign reading 'softsys' mounted on the support structure

segments.scene_description: The segment shows high-speed driving under a massive elevated highway structure with translucent ceiling panels that create a dappled lighting effect. The gold convertible weaves through moderate traffic while futuristic skyscrapers loom in the background. The green 'softsys' billboard is prominently visible on the left as the vehicle approaches the exit from the covered section.

scene_state.functional_zone: open multi-lane urban highway with overhead billboard gantries

events.description: exiting the shadow of the covered highway into bright direct sunlight
passing under a large overhead sign gantry with multiple digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: accelerating on the open highway, overtaking vehicles on both sides while navigating through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: dark SUV overtaken on the right side
red sports car driving in the left lane

entered.detail: massive steel framework spanning the highway with multiple digital billboards and traffic signs
large green neon sign for 'softsys' on the building facade, clearly visible in sunlight
raised pedestrian walkway or monorail structure running parallel to the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the covered highway into bright sunlight, revealing a dense urban canyon lined with towering buildings and massive overhead billboard structures. The 'softsys' neon sign dominates the left side while the camera accelerates past other vehicles. The elevated transit track runs parallel on the right as the scene opens up to full sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban highway transitioning to industrial area with decreasing commercial density

events.description: passing from dense commercial buildings into more open industrial landscape with visible factories
passing under a concrete overpass with red structural elements

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed as the environment transitions from urban commercial to industrial zone, passing various vehicles

notable_agents.action: red pickup truck traveling in the left lane
black sedan overtaken on the right side

entered.detail: concrete bridge structure crossing over the highway with red accent lighting
tall factory chimneys emitting white smoke visible against the blue sky
low-rise factory structures with metal siding and industrial equipment
trees with distinctive red and pink leaves lining the highway median

segments.scene_description: The highway transitions from dense urban commercial buildings to a more open industrial landscape. Red-leaved trees line the median while factory smokestacks appear on the horizon. The vehicle passes under concrete overpasses as the architecture shifts from glass towers to industrial facilities. Traffic remains moderate with various cars and trucks sharing the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway with factories, smokestacks, and power infrastructure

events.description: entering area with prominent industrial smokestacks and factory complexes on both sides
passing under an elevated monorail track with red rail cars visible above

agents.ego_description: driving through the industrial district with factories and smokestacks lining both sides of the highway, maintaining high speed

notable_agents.action: brown sedan traveling in the left lane
teal sports car overtaken on the right side

entered.detail: raised train track structure with red rail cars and concrete support pillars
high voltage electrical towers with multiple cables stretching across the landscape
large factory facility with multiple smokestacks, processing towers, and industrial piping
white windmill visible on the horizon against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle traveling through a sprawling industrial zone with massive factory complexes and smokestacks dominating the landscape. An elevated monorail track with red trains runs parallel to the highway overhead. High-voltage power lines and transmission towers line the right side, while a distant wind turbine is visible on the horizon. The environment is characterized by industrial infrastructure and open sky as the vehicle continues at high speed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed journey in a gold convertible that transitions from a sheltered urban highway into a sprawling, open industrial zone. It begins under a massive elevated structure with translucent panels that cast dappled light across the road, weaving through traffic past a green softsys billboard. As the vehicle emerges from the cover, the scene opens into a bright, sunlit urban canyon dominated by towering skyscrapers and massive neon signs, with an elevated transit track running parallel to the right. The environment then shifts from glass commercial towers to an industrial landscape, passing red-leaved trees and concrete overpasses as factory smokestacks appear on the horizon. Finally, the camera accelerates through a vast industrial complex characterized by high-voltage power lines, overhead monorail tracks with red trains, and a distant wind turbine under a clear sky.
